# Lumina – SEO & GEO Chrome Extension

> Lumina is a free, all-in-one Chrome extension for SEO professionals and web developers. It provides on-page audits, AI crawler checks, llms.txt validation, schema validation, Google Search Console and GA4 dashboards, keyword research, and AI-powered content tools — all directly in the browser.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://lumina-seo.com/): Overview of all features, comparison with other SEO extensions, and download link.
- [Privacy Policy](https://lumina-seo.com/privacy-policy.html): Full privacy policy. Lumina collects no data and has no backend server.
- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/lumina-seo-geo/infdhcbgmealoflmoakmnecgngaeihoe): Install the extension.

## What Lumina does

Lumina analyzes any webpage for SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) factors:

- On-page SEO: title, meta description, canonical, robots, HTTP status, SERP preview
- Crawling: robots.txt parser, sitemap check, hreflang validation, broken link checker
- GEO: AI crawler access check (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, etc.), llms.txt checker, AI Traffic Dashboard
- Schema: JSON-LD deep validation against actual page content
- Content: heading structure, word count, JS vs No-JS comparison
- Data: Google Search Console and GA4 dashboards with comparison charts
- Tools: keyword research, AI content optimization, local search simulation, screenshots
